rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they relate to component ports or inputs/outputs
Use implementation annexes for assignments that bind subcomponent outputs
Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: Place AGREE contracts in the appropriate scope based on their purpose
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid
Use visible identifiers for assumptions and guarantees
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
